description_long: This is a walk-behind, rotary lawn mower with a long, straight handlebar attached to a circular cutting deck. The deck is predominantly blue and black, with visible signs of wear and rust, suggesting heavy use. Two medium-sized wheels are mounted at the rear, providing mobility, while the front of the deck is flat and close to the ground for efficient grass cutting. A round, metallic engine housing sits atop the deck, and a separate, rusted circular component is visible beside the mower, possibly a removable part or an accessory. There is no visible grass collection bag attached to the mower. The overall construction appears robust, with metal and plastic as the primary materials.
description: A worn, blue and black rotary lawn mower with a long handlebar, rear wheels, and a round engine housing on top of the cutting deck. No grass collection bag is attached, and a separate rusted component lies beside it.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long handlebar, rear wheels, and the round engine housing on the blue and black cutting deck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat front of the cutting deck, the two rear wheels, and the detached rusted component beside the mower.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handlebar angle, rear wheels, and the engine housing, with the rusted component more clearly separated.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handlebar attachment, rear wheels, and the open back of the cutting deck, with the rusted component to the side.
attribute_engine_housing: round metallic housing above the cutting deck
